message:
test(conformance): expand LIST command edge case coverage

Adds ~50 tests for list commands: LRANGE negative/out-of-range indices,
LPOS with MAXLEN+RANK combinations, LSET first/last element, LMPOP
count larger than list and direction errors, LINSERT boundary positions,
LREM all occurrences and count>exist, LTRIM to empty, LPOP/RPOP
count edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
